items.title: Fashion is now the largest category on Whatnot as brands flock to the platform
items.summary: The live shopping app Whatnot is in the midst of a notable growth period. After a $225 million fundraising round, fashion is now its largest category, with brands flocking to the platform for live commerce opportunities.

items.title: Wellness Briefing: How stem cell therapy innovator Acorn Biolabs is scaling in the US
items.summary: Acorn Biolabs, a stem cell therapy innovator, is scaling its business in the US market, signaling the growing wellness tech trend in beauty.

items.title: Beauty brands are lining up for the frozen yogurt craze
items.summary: With its protein- and probiotic-packed bowls, froyo is back as the treat of the summer. Beauty brands are launching froyo-inspired skincare and bodycare products featuring probiotics and yogurt extracts.

items.title: Beauty Briefing: AI-developed fragrance molecules to be put up for auction at the World Perfumery Congress
items.summary: AI-powered fragrance startup Osmo is auctioning its patented AI-developed fragrance molecules at the World Perfumery Congress, signaling AI's growing role in fragrance innovation.

items.title: Ulta Beauty, Violet Grey And Printemps On Beauty Retail's Human Advantage In The Age Of AI
items.summary: Ulta Beauty, Violet Grey and Printemps discuss how personalized human curation remains a competitive advantage in beauty retail even as AI reshapes the industry.

items.title: Clear Health Launches Topical Isotretinoin As Alternative To Oral Accutane
items.summary: Clear Health has launched a topical isotretinoin product as a less systemic alternative to oral Accutane, targeting the growing prescription skincare and acne treatment segment in the US.

items.title: How Two Best Friends Are Bootstrapping Bur Bur To A Projected $20M In 2026 Sales
items.summary: Bur Bur, an indie beauty brand, is projected to reach $20M in sales in 2026 through bootstrapping, showing the strength of authentic DTC beauty brands without celebrity backing.

items.title: After Ulta Rollout, Unite Hair Deepens Retail Push With Sephora Debut
items.summary: Unite Hair, after building its business through salons for two decades, is now expanding into major retail with both Ulta Beauty and Sephora, signaling a shift in hair care retail strategy.

items.title: Kiuda Group Acquires CGETC To Build One-Stop Infrastructure Platform For K-Beauty
items.summary: Kiuda Group acquired CGETC to create a comprehensive infrastructure platform for K-beauty, making it easier for Korean beauty brands to enter and scale in the US market.

items.title: AI forces retailers, brands to rethink their product pages
items.summary: AI-powered search is forcing beauty and retail brands to redesign product pages to be more discoverable, with structured data and clear ingredient descriptions becoming essential.

items.title: Rising fuel costs push brands to adjust shipping policies
items.summary: Rising fuel costs are forcing brands, including beauty DTC brands, to raise free shipping thresholds and add delivery fees, potentially impacting conversion rates.

items.title: How Fashion Retail Is Talking the AI Talk
items.summary: From Walmart to Revolve, AI is transforming retail customer experience, including in beauty, with personalization and AI-powered recommendations becoming key differentiators.

items.title: 冻酸奶美容热潮：Kiehl's、Korres等品牌推出益生菌/酸奶护肤品
items.summary: Kiehl's与Go Greek合作、Korres等品牌推出含益生菌/酸奶成分的护肤&身体护理品，蹭2026夏季冻酸奶热潮。益生菌护肤在北美持续升温，是功效型护肤品新方向。

items.title: K-beauty基础设施整合：Kiuda Group收购CGETC打造一站式韩妆入美平台
items.summary: Kiuda Group收购CGETC，整合韩国美妆品牌入美通关/仓储/履约基础设施，大幅降低K-beauty出海门槛。结合Amazon榜单韩妆强势（medicube #1、BIODANCE #8），K-beauty供应链效率正在系统性提升。

items.title: 头皮护理爆品：Bur Bur 2026年预计销售额$2000万，在Revolve热销
items.summary: Bur Bur无需明星背书，聚焦头皮护理/生发赛道，通过Revolve平台实现2026年预计$2000万销售额。头皮健康品类在北美高增长，是独立品牌进入美妆零售渠道的新机会。

items.title: Amazon美妆护肤榜TOP热品：Korean skincare主导，痘贴/酸类护肤/矿物防晒强势
items.summary: Amazon美妆个护类目TOP榜：#1 medicube Toner Pads(韩妆/AHA+BHA/$18.90/25878评)；#3 Mighty Patch痘贴(Hero Cosmetics/$12.99/184084评，全榜评价数最高)；#5 The Ordinary Glycolic Acid Toner($13.50/52835评)；#6 Neutrogena卸妆巾($9.97/119653评)；#8 BIODANCE Bio-Collagen Real Deep Mask(韩妆/$19/46094评)；#12 EltaMD UV Clear防晒($45/69056评，皮肤科推荐)。K-beauty、功效护肤、防晒为北美三大热门赛道。
items.company: medicube, Hero Cosmetics, The Ordinary, Neutrogena, BIODANCE, EltaMD
